raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Investment in water efficiency is critical and necessary due to climate change exacerbating droughts, extreme heat, and extended wildfire seasons in California.",
    "Consumer rebates are a proven, cost-effective tool for reducing outdoor water footprint.",
    "California's current megadrought is the worst in at least 1,200 years.",
    "The human-caused climate crisis has made California's drought 72% worse.",
    "68 percent of traditional landscaping and turf replacement rebates in the service area of the Metropolitan Water District of Southern California went to low- and medium-income households.",
    "55 percent of rebate recipients from the San Diego County Water Authority were low- and medium-income families."
  ]
}
```
